subject: fix(audit): hacks, dead code, stale closures, and perf from branch review
body:
Addresses findings from branch code review:

Hacks removed:
- Remove arbitrary 300ms setTimeout in ChatPanel mark-as-read — isLoading
  guard already ensures messages loaded, delay was unnecessary
- Replace hardcoded production URL in send-notification Edge Function with
  APP_BASE_URL env var (defaults to production, works in dev/staging)

Dead code removed:
- Remove ineffective `mounted` guard in home.tsx web refetch — variable was
  always true when checked, never set to false before the sync check

Performance:
- Replace O(n log n) sort on every realtime message with O(1) prepend —
  new messages are always newest, just insert at index 0
- Same fix for optimistic message insertion on send

Bug fixes:
- Fix stale closure in InAppNotification auto-dismiss timer — onDismiss
  callback stored in ref so timer always calls latest version
- Log polling and foreground refresh errors instead of silently swallowing

Tags: bugfix, performance, code-quality, cleanup
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-audit
Semver: patch

title: hacks, dead code, stale closures, and perf from branch review
